title: Nyf's Banner Patterns
description: Adds a bunch of new Banner Patterns!
body:
![Nyfs Banners](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/977009237861498990/1092882498335293520/image.png)

Nyf's Banner Patterns adds Many Many Banner Patterns, with Many more to Come!


Ways to Obtain the Banner Patterns:
- Alpha-numerical and Punctuation patterns Automatically Unlocked, no pattern item needed
- Moon  Pattern Item: Chance to receive it if you stay up late .
- Carrot Pattern Item: Chance to receive it while farming Carrots.
- Beetroot Pattern Item: Chance to receive it while farming Beetroot.
- Vex Pattern Item: Chance to receive it when you kill a Vex.
- Llama Pattern Item: Chance to receive it when you kill a Llama(you monster!)
- Egg Pattern Item: Chance to receive it when you kill a Rabbit.
- Gem Pattern Item: 4 Diamond and 4 Emerald alternating around a piece of paper in a crafting table.
